title: OpenAI Residency
summary: As part of our effort to support and develop AI talent, we’re excited to announce the OpenAI Residency.
summaryZh: 作为我们支持和培养人工智能人才的努力的一部分，我们很高兴地宣布OpenAI Residency。
highlights: As part of our effort to support and develop AI talent, we’re excited to announce the OpenAI Residency.
highlightsZh: 作为我们支持和培养人工智能人才的努力的一部分，我们很高兴地宣布OpenAI Residency。

title: OpenAI’s API now available with no waitlist
titleZh: OpenAI的API现已可用，无等待名单
summary: Wider availability made possible by safety progress.
